records.ety: [L. remuneratus, p. p. of remunerare, remunerari; pref. re- re- + munerare, munerari, to give, present, from munus, muneris, a gift, present. Cf. Munificent.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Remunerated (-?"t?d); p. pr. & vb. n. Remunerating.]

defs: To pay an equivalent to for any service, loss, expense, or other sacrifice; to recompense; to requite; as, to remunerate men for labor.
